company: Sherwood Park Hall | Community Venue Ofsted Childcare & SEND Support
summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Sherwood Park Hall CIO is a community charity in Mitcham, Merton, and Pollards Hill offering low-cost and free services, including SEND (Special Educational Needs and Disabilities) support for families, childcare, holiday activities, food resources, and health/wellbeing classes.
